overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a scenic mountain landscape. The character begins on a rocky overlook, descends to a dirt trail, and follows a horse rider through grassy terrain with pine trees and rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain overlook with panoramic valley views

events.description: character turns left and begins descending from rocky outcrop to dirt path

agents.ego_description: standing on rocky overlook admiring the mountain vista, then turning to walk down to the trail

entered.detail: large gray rock formation serving as overlook point with steep edges
distant snow-capped peaks and rolling hills under blue sky
green valley visible between mountain peaks in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast mountain valley with distant peaks. After a moment, he turns left and begins descending toward a dirt trail. The scene is wide open with full sky visibility and scattered pine trees on the slopes.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain dirt path with rock walls

events.description: horse rider appears on the path ahead and continues forward along the trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail following a horse rider who is moving ahead on the path

notable_agents.action: riding a brown horse along the path ahead, gradually moving further away

entered.detail: narrow dirt and grass path winding through the mountains
massive gray boulders and rock walls lining the right side of the path
green grass and wildflowers covering the left slope

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail with large rock formations on the right and grassy hillsides on the left. A horse rider appears ahead on the path and moves forward, with the character following behind. The pine trees recede into the distance as the path progresses deeper into the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed mountain trail with dense vegetation and rock walls

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding mountain path alone after the horse rider has moved out of sight ahead

entered.detail: tall green bushes and shrubs growing close to the path edge
steep rock face rising immediately beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes more enclosed as the character walks alone through denser vegetation. Tall shrubs line the left side while a rocky cliff rises on the right. The horse rider is no longer visible, having moved far ahead. The path continues winding through the mountainous terrain with pine trees now visible straight ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, elevated mountain overlook down into a more enclosed, winding wilderness trail. It begins on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast valley with distant peaks before the character turns and descends toward a dirt path. As the camera follows the character along this winding trail, the open vista shifts to a corridor of large rock formations and grassy hillsides where a horse rider appears ahead. The scene then tightens as the rider disappears and the path becomes more enclosed, with tall shrubs and a rising rocky cliff narrowing the field of view. Finally, the movement continues deeper into the mountainous terrain, heading toward a distant cluster of pine trees.
